body:
Hello, Jeffrey ,  finally im in London!!!!things  goes well so far... how r you ??? ive try to call you today , but it was  early
morning....ill  call you tomorrow ev..
just in case my nom is 07505038184
N i hope to c you here in london!!!
Miss you!!!
Sincerely yours V.
